query:
-- Collaboration: $10/seat cost, revenue = seats × $23
-- Calculate seats from revenue and set cost = seats × $10
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = ROUND((monthlyRevenue / 23.00) * 10.00, 2),
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName = 'Collaboration'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND status = 'active';

-- Managed Voice Support 1-10 Users: cost = $75
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 75.00,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%1%10%'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND status = 'active';

-- Managed Voice Support 11-25 Users: cost = $100
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 100.00,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%11%25%'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND status = 'active';

-- Verify results
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND(s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (
  s.planName LIKE '%Collaboration%' 
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Manage%Voice%'
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice%'
)
AND s.status = 'active'
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue DESC;

UPDATE services

    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%1%10%'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND status = 'active';

UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 100.00,
    updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE planName LIKE '%Managed Voice Support%11%25%'
  AND provider = 'SasBoss'
  AND status = 'active';

-- Verify results
SELECT 
  s.externalId,
  s.planName,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  ROUND(s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost, 2) as margin,
  ROUND((s.monthlyRevenue - s.monthlyCost) / s.monthlyRevenue * 100, 1) as marginPct,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE (
  s.planName LIKE '%Collaboration%' 
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Manage%Voice%'
  OR s.planName LIKE '%Managed Voice%'
)
AND s.status = 'active'
ORDER BY s.planName, s.monthlyRevenue DESC;
